answers.1: Brain V1 chunks can be uploaded as JSON to ssss and picked up by fetchSBCContext (lines 1871-1932). Filename pattern: *_extracted_chunks.json. Shape: array of {text, pageStart, pageEnd, source, section_number}.
answers.2: fetchSBCContext returns {context, files, sourceMeta}. SourcePageMeta: {file, pageStart, pageEnd, precision, sectionRef, sectionConfidence}. Frontend headers: X-SBC-Sources and X-SBC-Source-Meta.
answers.3: Yes if section_number matches verbatim heading text, set high; else medium. Verifier respects ledger confidence and won't downgrade high.
answers.4: Load sidecars before streaming with loadBrainV1Sidecars() helper. Prepend with NOT CITABLE header. Buffered verifier unchanged because it checks only model output.
answers.5: Primary mode already loads zero documents. Add guard: skip for mode === 'primary'.
answers.6: Prepend sidecar with NOT CITABLE header. Any citation attempt will be auto-downgraded to conf:low by verifyAdvisoryCitations.
answers.7: Gate sidecar load on keywords in analysis mode. validateAnalyticalReport won't change; sidecars not in Section VIII evidence.
answers.8: Add helper loadBrainV1Sidecars (20 lines) after 2623. Add call site (6-8 lines) at 5131. No changes to streaming, verifier, validator.
answers.9: git revert two commits + delete bucket files. No DB rollback.
answers.10: Route C (Hybrid). Bucket only, zero DB writes. Simplest, safest. Existing code supports it. Primary unaffected. Advisory/Analytical gate on keywords. Sidecars loaded before stream. Verifier auto-drops non-ledger citations.

rollback_plan: git revert two commits and delete bucket files
